zh.title: 比特币/美元技术分析：[震荡整理，短期待突破]
zh.content:
当前比特币/美元（BTC/USD）处于区间震荡整理状态，价格在78000美元附近波动。短期内市场缺乏强烈的趋势性信号，可能会出现整理后选择方向的局面。此时投资者需注意突破信号的出现，才能做出明确的交易决策。

从技术指标来看，RSI和MACD未给出明确的趋势指引。RSI值未提供，意味着市场在动量上尚未给出超买或超卖的信号。而MACD的值为106.26588，虽然呈现一定的上升态势，但信号线尚未形成，因此无法确定短期内是否会出现明确的买入或卖出信号。

支撑位方面，当前价格接近78000美元，若跌破此位置，可能会进一步测试更低的支撑区间，如77000美元。阻力位则位于78500美元附近，突破此价位可能会促使价格上涨至79000美元或更高。

建议投资者在此区间震荡整理时，保持观望，等待突破78000美元下方支撑位或78500美元上方阻力位的信号出现。可考虑设置止损，并在突破确认后做出相应的操作。

en.title: Bitcoin vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Bitcoin has shown a slight retracement after testing the upper range near 78,307, currently hovering around 78,116. The short-term trend appears neutral to mildly bearish, as the latest price is slightly below the 20-period SMA at 78,405. This suggests sellers have marginal control, though the minimal 24-hour loss of 0.17% indicates consolidation rather than a decisive pullback. Price action around this zone will be crucial to determine whether BTC resumes upward momentum or continues sideways pressure.  

The MACD reading at 106.27, without a corresponding signal line, implies the bullish momentum is present but potentially weakening. Typically, when price trades below a key moving average and momentum indicators show declining strength, cautious positioning is warranted. Traders should monitor for a MACD crossover or divergence that could confirm a trend reversal. Lack of an RSI reading leaves overbought or oversold conditions unclear, so price behavior around support and resistance becomes even more significant in guiding entries.  

Immediate support is evident near 78,098, aligning closely with the intraday low, while resistance sits at the SMA near 78,405 and the daily high at 78,307. A sustained break above 78,405 could invite short-term bullish interest targeting the next psychological level around 78,700–78,800. Conversely, a decisive drop below 78,098 may open room for a test near 77,900, emphasizing the importance of protective stop-loss levels for long positions.  

For trading strategy, short-term participants might adopt a range-bound approach, buying near support with tight stops and scaling out near the SMA resistance. Momentum traders could wait for MACD confirmation before entering, as current conditions suggest limited upside conviction. Conservative investors should remain patient, favoring a confirmed breakout above 78,405 before committing significant capital, while short-sellers may consider cautious positions if support fails. Overall, BTC is consolidating within a narrow band, signaling a preparatory phase before the next directional move.
